nl_query: Identify all students who are marked ELIGIBLE in the exam roster but have no corresponding answer script with lifecycle status ATTEMPTED, indicating a potential scanning gap.
failed_sql:
SELECT esm.student_id, esm.student_name, esm.eligibility_status, esm.course_id, esm.exam_id, esm.enrollment_status, esm.academic_year, esm.email, esm.synced_at
FROM   exam_student_mapping esm
LEFT JOIN answer_script a ON a.student_id = esm.student_id AND a.exam_id = esm.exam_id
WHERE  esm.eligibility_status = 'ELIGIBLE'
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM answer_script a WHERE a.student_id = esm.student_id AND a.exam_id = esm.exam_id AND a.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED')
LIMIT  1000;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): student_cache.student_name, exam_student_mapping.enrollment_status, exam_student_mapping.academic_year, exam_student_mapping.email. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
